steps.title: Cover performance and participation
steps.content: The text gives two main facts: the Black Pearl orchestra performs classical music, and its iConduct! program lets community members learn conducting basics and conduct the orchestra themselves.

steps.title: Reject narrow claims
steps.content: Choice A invents a focus on Philadelphian composers. Choice B overstates one example, Jessie Montgomery, as the founding purpose. Choice D invents a goal of proving difficulty. The main idea must include both listening to and participating in classical performance. The answer is C.
